# Data Source (datadog_org_groups)

Use this data source to retrieve all org groups in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List every org group in the organization.
data "datadog_org_groups" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `groups` (List of Object) The list of org groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `owner_org_site` (String)
- `owner_org_uuid` (String)
